name: Dress to impress cupid
description:
He is a strikingly handsome, angelic figure with a confident and slightly mischievous air. His voluminous, curly pink hair is slightly tousled, giving him a carefree yet stylish look. His eyes, narrow and expressive, gleam with playful charm, and his smirk carries a teasing, flirtatious quality, as if heâ€TMs in on a secret only he knows. His skin is fair and smooth, complementing his youthful and vibrant appearance.

He is dressed in an elegant yet flamboyant outfit reminiscent of historical romance attire. He wears a crisp, white, long-sleeved shirt with an elaborate ruffled collar cascading down his chest, adding an air of sophistication. Over the shirt, he dons a well-fitted, sleeveless pink vest that enhances his bold and confident persona. The vest is a rich shade of pink, harmonizing perfectly with his hair. His sleeves are puffed at the shoulders but taper down to snug, buttoned cuffs, adding a refined touch to his ensemble.

Attached to his back are large, feathery white wings that extend gracefully outward, their texture soft and luminous, reinforcing his celestial nature. The wings are full and majestic, subtly blending with the soft pastel background.

In his hands, he firmly grasps a golden bow with elegant curves, its polished surface reflecting light. The bowstring glows faintly, hinting at some magical or divine power. His posture is relaxed yet poised, as if he is always ready to strike with one of his enchanted arrows.
creator: Miss wanna die
